items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Generic pure-shadcn data table (sorting, filtering, pagination) built on @tanstack/react-table.

items.name: media-storage-chart
items.title: Media Storage Chart
items.description: shadcn chart preset (recharts) for media storage bytes per category, with a base-1024 byte humanizer.

items.name: media-dashboard-overview
items.title: Media Admin Dashboard Overview
items.description: Media storage dashboard (stat cards + chart + subscriptions table) driven by the package's useMediaAdmin hook. Requires @fa-m8/astro-media-m8 installed.

items.name: media-maintenance-panel
items.title: Media Admin Maintenance Panel
items.description: Media admin danger zone (purge-stale / repair-orphans / purge-expired), each behind a shadcn alert-dialog confirmation, driven by useMediaAdmin. Requires @fa-m8/astro-media-m8 installed.

items.name: admin-media-dashboard
items.title: Admin Media Dashboard
items.description: Media admin view whose first/landing tab is the storage dashboard and whose destructive ops live in a guarded Maintenance tab; wraps the package's MediaProvider + RequireSuperuser. Requires @fa-m8/astro-media-m8 (and a fa-auth-m8 token adapter) installed.
